eas_text: A civil authority has issued AN ADMINISTRATIVE MESSAGE for the following counties or areas: Arizona; at 11:22 PM on JUL 1, 2026 Effective until 7:22 AM JUL 2, 2026. Message from WSLF/CAP.
extra_text: A SAFE Alert has been issued for Phoenix Police Department. This is the Arizona Department of Public Safety. Phoenix Police Department is looking for male, Eugene Glass, 80 years old, 5' 11", 168 pounds, brown eyes, bald head, and uses a red walker last seen on foot wearing unknown clothing. If you have contact with this SAFE Alert, please call 911. Monitor TV and Radio for updates.
